message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[0, 1, 2, 3, 4]]","[[0, 0, 0, 0, 0]]","0"],"focus":"Single-row (1xN) increasing fertility with all zero water costs and zero budget — tests handling of budget=0 and linear movement."},{"input_lines":["[[1, 2, 9], [2, 3, 8], [1, 4, 7]]","[[5, 1, 1], [1, 5, 1], [1, 1, 1]]","12"],"focus":"Small 3x3 with multiple competing increasing paths and differing water costs — checks deterministic tie-breaking and correct budget-feasible selection among equal-length paths."},{"input_lines":["[[10]]","[[11]]","10"],"focus":"Single-cell where the only cell's water cost exceeds the budget — tests that the function returns 0 when no feasible start exists."}]}
